query_title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason

recommendations.title: Shotgun Wedding

recommendations.title: Materialists
recommendations.overview: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

recommendations.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
recommendations.overview: Bridget Jones navigates life as a widow and single mum with the help of her family, friends, and former lover, Daniel. Back to work and on the apps, she's pursued by a younger man and maybe – just maybe – her son's science teacher.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: The Party 2
recommendations.overview: A young French teenage girl after moving to a new city falls in love with a boy and is thinking of having sex with him because her girlfriends have already done it.

recommendations.title: A Good Marriage
recommendations.overview: After 25 years of a good marriage, what will Darcy do once she discovers her husband's sinister secret?

recommendations.title: Hello World
recommendations.overview: A shy high schooler in Kyoto meets a man claiming to be his future self, who tells him he’s hacked into the past to save their first love.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Happy Anniversary
recommendations.overview: A quirky couple spends their three-year dating anniversary looking back at their relationship and contemplating whether they should break up.

recommendations.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
